rows.note: base_fn is re-exported by RexAll via static splice (our @EXPORT = ('all_fn', @RexBase::EXPORT)); goto-def from the consumer must reach the original sub in RexBase. Depends on the re-export transitive-surface feature.
more_fn is re-exported by RexAll via loop-push (for my $m (qw(RexMore)) { push @EXPORT, @{"${m}::EXPORT"} }); goto-def must reach RexMore. Exercises re-export form 2.
all_fn is RexAll's own export (control): goto-def reaches RexAll itself, confirming the re-exporter's own surface still resolves alongside the spliced/pushed ones.
